Main GUI Component Requirements¶

Component Requirement: The main GUI layout shall include at least: main menu, main toolbar, vertical resource tabs/tools, console/logging area, experimentation/recording area, and modeling canvas. STUDIO-COMP-GUI-001
Component Requirement: The main window shall load reliably and enable/disable context functions based on the active mode. STUDIO-COMP-GUI-002
Component Requirement: A simulation context menu should provide direct Stimulate/Measure actions for variables. STUDIO-COMP-GUI-003
Component Requirement: Runtime value/status visualization during simulation should update efficiently and remain responsive. STUDIO-COMP-GUI-004

Main GUI Layout (reference)¶

synarius-studio
